meta.author: Michael Vernen Thomas Hartmann
meta.description: EN↔SO legal terminology glossary for Hartmann Legal Analytics / VERNEN™
meta.note: Legal citations (e.g., 'Family Code § 3044') are NEVER translated — they appear in original language in both EN and SO contexts.

terms.en_def: Legal right to make decisions about a child's care and/or physical possession of a child.
terms.so_def: Xaq sharci ah oo lagu sameeyo go'aamo ku saabsan daryeelka ilmaha iyo/ama hayashada jirka ah ee ilmaha.

terms.en_def: One parent has the right and responsibility to make decisions relating to the health, education, and welfare of the child.
terms.so_def: Hal waalid ayaa leh xaqa iyo mas'uuliyadda go'aaminta arrimaha caafimaadka, waxbarashada, iyo daryeelka ilmaha.

terms.en_def: Both parents share the right and responsibility to make decisions relating to the health, education, and welfare of the child.
terms.so_def: Labada waalid waxay wadaagaan xaqa iyo mas'uuliyadda go'aaminta arrimaha caafimaadka, waxbarashada, iyo daryeelka ilmaha.

terms.en_def: Refers to where the child lives on a day-to-day basis.
terms.so_def: Waxay tixraacaysaa halka ilmuhu ku nool yahay maalin kasta.

terms.en_def: The schedule of time a non-custodial parent spends with the child.
terms.so_def: Jadwalka wakhtiga uu waalidka aan xadaanada haysan la qaato ilmaha.

terms.en_def: A court order that prohibits a person from specific acts, such as contacting or approaching another person.
terms.so_def: Amar maxkamad oo ka mamnuucaya qof fallo gaar ah, sida la xiriirka ama u soo dhoweysta qof kale.

terms.en_def: Abuse committed against a current or former spouse, cohabitant, co-parent, or person in a dating relationship.
terms.so_def: Xadgudub lagu sameeyo xaaska ama ninkii hore, qofka la deggan, waalidka wadaaga, ama qofka xidhiidhka jacaylka.

terms.en_def: Constitutional guarantee that legal proceedings will be fair and that individuals will be given notice and an opportunity to be heard.
terms.so_def: Dammaanad qaadka dastuuriga ah in dacwadaha sharciga ay noqon doonaan kuwo cadaalad ah iyo in shakhsiyaadka la siin doono ogeysiis iyo fursad lagu maqlo.

terms.en_def: Constitutional guarantee under the 14th Amendment that no person shall be denied equal protection of the laws.
terms.so_def: Dammaanad qaadka dastuuriga ah ee hoos yimaada Wax-ka-beddelka 14-aad in qofna aan loo diidi karin difaaca siman ee sharciyada.

terms.en_def: Federal civil rights action against state actors who violate constitutional rights under color of law (42 USC § 1983).
terms.so_def: Dacwad xuquuqda madaniga ah ee federaalka ah oo ka dhan ah shaqaalaha dawladda ee ku xadgudbay xuquuqda dastuuriga ah magaca sharciga (42 USC § 1983).

terms.en_def: The act of taking, detaining, or concealing a child in violation of a custody order.
terms.so_def: Falkii qaadista, xidhista, ama qarinta ilmo si ku xad-gudub ah amarka xadaanada.

terms.en_def: A person required by law to report suspected child abuse or neglect (Penal Code § 11165.7).
terms.so_def: Qof uu sharcigu u waajibiyey inuu soo sheego tuhmada xadgudubyada ama dayacaadda carruurta (Penal Code § 11165.7).

terms.en_def: A CPS finding that credible evidence supports the allegation of abuse or neglect.
terms.so_def: Go'aanka CPS ah in cadaymo la aamini karo ay taageeraysaa eedaynta xadgudubyada ama dayacaadda.

terms.en_def: Emergency conditions that justify immediate action without a warrant, such as imminent danger to a child.
terms.so_def: Xaaladaha gurmadka ee sababeeya tallaabo degdeg ah oo aan amar maxkamadeed lahayn, sida khatarta dhow ee ilmaha.

terms.en_def: Sufficient reason based on known facts to believe a crime has been committed or evidence will be found.
terms.so_def: Sabab ku filan oo ku salaysan xaqiiqooyin la yaqaan in la rumaysto in dembi la galay ama cadaymo la heli doono.

terms.en_def: The right to remain silent and have an attorney during custodial interrogation.
terms.so_def: Xaqa in la aamuuso iyo in qareen lala yeesho inta lagu jiro su'aal-waydiinta xilliga xadhiga.

terms.en_def: The standard courts use to make custody and visitation decisions (Family Code § 3011).
terms.so_def: Heerka maxkamadaha u adeegsadaan go'aaminta xadaanada iyo booqashada (Family Code § 3011).

terms.en_def: A proceeding or communication made by one party without notice to the opposing party.
terms.so_def: Dacwad ama xiriir uu sameeyay hal dhinac oo aan ogeysiis loo dirin dhinaca kale.

terms.en_def: Postponement of a court hearing to a future date.
terms.so_def: Dib-u-dhigista dhagaysiga maxkamadda taariikh mustaqbalka ah.

terms.en_def: Pre-trial process where parties exchange relevant information and evidence.
terms.so_def: Habka ka hor dacwadda halkaas oo dhinacyadu isku weydaarsadaan macluumaad iyo cadaymo khuseeya.

terms.en_def: Willful disobedience of a court order, punishable by fine or imprisonment.
terms.so_def: Caasimaysi ula kac ah oo amarka maxkamadda ah, oo lagu ciqaabi karo ganax ama xadhig.

terms.en_def: A formal written request submitted to the court asking for a specific action.
terms.so_def: Codsi rasmi ah oo qoraal ah oo loo gudbiyay maxkamadda oo weydiinaya fal gaar ah.

terms.en_def: The party against whom a petition or motion is filed.
terms.so_def: Dhinaca lagu soo gudbiyay dacwadda ama codsiga.

terms.en_def: The party who files a petition or initiates a legal proceeding.
terms.so_def: Dhinaca dacwadda gudbiya ama bilaaba dacwadda sharciga.

terms.en_def: A court order requiring a person to testify or produce documents.
terms.so_def: Amar maxkamadeed oo qof u baahan in uu marqaati furo ama dukumentiyo soo bandhigo.

terms.en_def: An act by a government official that deprives a person of rights guaranteed by the Constitution or federal law.
terms.so_def: Fal uu sameeyay sarkaal dowladeed oo ka xoreeya qof xuquuqda uu dammaanad qaadayo Dastuurka ama sharciga federaalka.

terms.en_def: Actions taken by government officials using their authority, whether or not the actions are lawful.
terms.so_def: Tallaabooyinka ay qaadaan sarkaalaha dawladda iyagoo adeegsanaya awooddooda, ha noqoto tallaabooyinku kuwo sharci ah iyo kuwa aan ahayn.

terms.en_def: Legal doctrine that protects government officials from civil liability unless they violated clearly established law.
terms.so_def: Mabda' sharci oo ka ilaaliya sarkaalaha dawladda mas'uuliyadda madaniga ah marka laga reebo haddii ay ku xad-gudbeen sharci si cad loo dejiyay.

terms.en_def: A law enforcement visit to check on a person's safety and well-being.
terms.so_def: Booqashada ciidanka booliska si loo hubiyo badbaadada iyo ladnayda qof.

terms.en_def: Computer-Aided Dispatch report documenting law enforcement calls for service.
terms.so_def: Warbixin Dirida Kaalmada Kombuyuuterka oo diiwaangelisa wicitaanada adeegga ee ciidanka fulinta sharciga.

terms.so: Ku-dhaqanka Sharciga ee aan Fasax lahayn
terms.en_def: Engaging in legal practice without a license, prohibited under Business and Professions Code § 6125.
terms.so_def: Ka qayb-galka dhaqanka sharciga oo aan rukhsad lahayn, oo laga mamnuucay sida ku cad Business and Professions Code § 6125.

terms.en_def: A legal obligation to act in the best interest of another party.
terms.so_def: Waajib sharci ah oo loo falgalo danaha ugu wanaagsan ee dhinac kale.

terms.en_def: A court order requiring that a detained person be brought before the court to determine whether detention is lawful.
terms.so_def: Amar maxkamadeed oo lagu dalbanayo in qofka la xirayo la keeno maxkamadda si loo go'aamiyo in xadhigu sharci yahay iyo in kale.

terms.en_def: A party who represents themselves in court without an attorney.
terms.so_def: Dhinac isaga u matala maxkamadda oo aan qareen lahayn.

terms.en_def: The final outcome or decision in a legal proceeding or investigation.
terms.so_def: Natiijada ugu dambaysa ama go'aanka dacwadda sharciga ama baadhitaanka.

terms.en_def: The standard of proof in civil cases requiring that something is more likely true than not.
terms.so_def: Heerka cadaymaha ee dacwadaha madaniga ah oo u baahan in wax ay u badan tahay inay run yihiin.
